titleStmt.title: SII 35.9: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 9. (A.R. No. 62 of 1950-51.) HIRĒKAṆGI, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Hero-stone near the dilapidated Nārāyaṇa temple outside the village.

This inscription is dated Śaka year 903, Vishu, Paushya śu. 15, Sunday, Hastā, Vyatīpāta, Bālavakaraṇa. The given details of date correspond with A.D. 981, December 13. However, other details do not tally.

This records the death of Chaṭṭayya in an attack by Bīravarma when Kaṇṇapayya was governing Banavāsi-12000. Eṟagāri was holding the office of Nāḻ-gāvuṇḍu. The mention of “Eṟagāri aynūṟakkam” seems to denote an administrative division of 500 looked after by Nāḷgāvuṇḍa. Also there is a mention of the administrative division Bāḍa-500 and Piriya-Kaṇnage [modern Hirekaṇgi] was within this division.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti tayilapadēva prituvīrājyaṁ geyye kannapayyaṁ banavāsi panni
¨rccāsiramanāḷe Eṟagāri Aynūṟakkaṁ nāḷgāvuṇḍugeyye caṭṭayya sūḷgeyye

sakanṛpakāḷātītasaṁvatsarada sataṁga 903 neya viṣusaṁvatsara ṣauṣya suddha puṇna
me Ādityavāramuṁ hasta nakṣatramuṁ vyatipātamuṁ bālavameṁba ka
raṇamuṁ prava¨rttise bīrava¨rmmaṁ Aynūṟu bāḍakkaṁ samudra mēre dappa vi
nne tapabandu Aynūṟu bāḍavanettara taraḷdara nīteraḷditandu piriyakaṇnageya
mēlevandu kāyakāhaṇaṁ geyye Idana sama ttavinda tti ko
ṇḍa kaḍida vanduva kulatilakaṁ caṭṭayyana baḻdati nikka teṁka
ja
goṇḍa
Digital edition of SII 35.9 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
